animation.set_end: Mark End: Setting the final node of '{{word}}' as end of word [Word]
animation.delete_start: Delete: Preparing to find and delete word '{{word}}'
animation.delete_unmark: Unmark: Removing the end-of-word mark [Word] from '{{word}}'
animation.delete_prune: Bottom-up Pruning: Prefix '{{pruned}}' is no longer shared, removing node

ui.loadListTooltip: Open the advanced word list loader
ui.randomCountTooltip: Set the number of random words (max {{max}})
ui.randomTooltip: Generate a set of words with shared prefixes
ui.resetTooltip: Clear all words and restore the initial state
ui.insertTooltip: Insert the word character by character into the Trie
ui.searchTooltip: Search whether the exact word exists
ui.deleteTooltip: Unmark end-of-word and prune unused branches upward

modal.title: Custom Trie Word List
modal.placeholder:
Enter English words, e.g.:
apple
banana
cat
modal.hint: * Words are auto-lowercased; duplicates and non-letter characters are removed. Limit: {{max}}.
modal.emptyWarning: Please enter at least one word!
modal.invalidWarning: Trie only accepts letters. The following were skipped: {{words}}
modal.noValidWords: No valid words found. Please try again.
modal.truncateWarning: Limited to the first {{max}} unique words for readability.
